name: Object transformation (Ensemble)

author.role: collective (imported material only) — this lens renders Ensemble's own reading of what it did with the source material, not The Middle's

purpose: Layered lineage grouped by the work's own material tier (VERIFIED / DISCLOSED RECONSTRUCTION / IMAGINED), not by time: what Ensemble preserved, re-voiced, declined to carry, and imagined when it built Native Speaker on instrument 001. The Minnesota omission renders as a visible negative band, with Ensemble's own verbatim rationale, not a silent gap.

selection.notes: Events 02/04/06/07 (design §3.2); both Ensemble-authored assertions; both active obligations Ensemble holds toward instrument 001's live status.

declared_exclusions.reason: Meridian's counter-framing (assert-enc2026001-meridian-live-framing) is excluded here — the source's response is visible in the compare view, not here.
Events 01/03/05 (the standing contract's publication and Meridian's own correction chain) are excluded — this lens groups by material tier, not the full time-ordered chain; see provenance-v1.
